name: Small Business Owner
description: Small business owner making purchase decisions with limited budget and resources
context: Small Business Owner wears multiple hats and makes purchase decisions carefully. They need solutions that are affordable, easy to implement, and deliver clear ROI quickly.

alwaysAsks: Do I have time for this?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through practical ROI lens. Needs affordable, simple, quick-win solutions.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on ROI clarity, affordability, ease of implementation, support, and time-to-value.
